history.description: a circle, breathing
history.tweet: L1: a circle, breathing.

history.description: a line, growing and rotating
history.tweet: L2: a line, learning to turn.

history.description: a triangle that follows you
history.tweet: L3: it knows you are there.

history.description: three shapes orbit, trailing afterimages
history.tweet: L4: they remember where they have been.

history.description: color wakes up. tap to multiply.
history.tweet: L5: color wakes up. tap to multiply.

history.description: citrus rings. tap to crack one open.
history.tweet: L6: crack one open.

history.description: bouncing citrus drops on cream. tap to fill the jar.
history.tweet: L7: fill the jar.

history.description: tap to place nodes. they connect. drag to reshape.
history.tweet: L8: they found each other.

history.description: energy pulses through the network. tap to surge.
history.tweet: L9: the network has a heartbeat.

history.description: every shape from L1-L9 together. the last sketch.
history.tweet: L10: reunion.

history.description: sixty creatures flock with simple rules. tap to scatter. hold to attract.
history.tweet: L11: they learned to move together.

history.description: tap to plant. branches fork and reach.
history.tweet: L12: tap anywhere. watch it reach.

history.description: liquid citrus. tap to drop. blobs pool, merge, ripple.
history.tweet: L13: they learned to flow.

history.description: tap to claim territory. seeds drift, regions shift, borders breathe.
history.tweet: L14: everything claims its space.

history.description: sound unlocked. 8 strings, pentatonic scale. tap to pluck, drag to bend. wave physics.
history.tweet: L15: they learned to sing.

history.description: drum machine. 4 voices, 8-step sequencer. tap pads to program. hit play.
history.tweet: L16: they learned to keep time.

history.description: tap to place notes. a playhead sweeps across, ringing each one. compose with your finger.
history.tweet: L17: tap to compose. the playhead remembers.

history.description: drag anywhere to play. x = pitch, y = volume. four voices. the screen is a theremin.
history.tweet: L18: drag to sing. the screen becomes an instrument.

history.description: tap to make a sound. it echoes off the walls, bouncing and shifting pitch. you hear the shape of the room.
history.tweet: L19: tap. listen to the room answer.

history.description: 700 particles follow an invisible field. tap to disturb the current. fabric-like flow, ambient drone.
history.tweet: L20: the current knows where to go. tap to bend it.

history.description: tap to place masses. they orbit each other. gravity pulls, trails trace orbits, collisions merge and blend.
history.tweet: L21: tap to add mass. watch them orbit.

history.description: chemical patterns grow from noise. drag to seed. double-tap to shift chemistry between coral, spots, maze.
history.tweet: L22: drag to seed. the chemistry decides the pattern.

history.description: a cloth of citrus threads. drag to pull. tear if you go too far. verlet physics, spring constraints.
history.tweet: L23: drag the cloth. pull to tear.

history.description: spinning arms at different harmonics draw a hidden curve. tap to add a frequency. double-tap to clear.
history.tweet: L24: every curve is just circles spinning at different speeds.

history.description: 15 pendulums of increasing length. they start in sync, drift into waves, then re-sync after 60 seconds. the last sketch.
history.tweet: L25: they drift apart. they always come back.

history.description: 320,000 points iterate one rule. no plan. the shape finds itself. tap to change the rule. seven clifford attractors.
history.tweet: L26: 320,000 points. one rule. they find the shape themselves.

history.description: three species. predators hunt prey. prey eat plants. plants grow. tap to intervene. balance finds itself or collapses.
history.tweet: L27: predators hunt. prey flee. plants grow. balance finds itself.

history.description: tap to seed. particles wander until they touch the crystal. chaos, one step at a time, becomes coral.
history.tweet: L28: every branch, chosen by accident.

history.description: langton's ant. two rules. chaos for 10,000 steps, then a highway appears from nowhere. tap to add ants.
history.tweet: L29: two rules. chaos first. then the highway appears.

history.description: 600 particles trace the lorenz butterfly simultaneously in 3D. drag to spin. chaos has a shape. ambient drone modulates with the system.
history.tweet: L30: the butterfly. chaos has a shape. drag to see it.

history.description: 3D wireframe terrain from noise. peaks and valleys morph over time. drag to orbit. citrus elevation coloring.
history.tweet: L31: the landscape breathes. drag to orbit.

history.description: three magnets, one pendulum. every starting position maps to a magnet. the map is a fractal. live pendulum swings over it. tap to change the magnets.
history.tweet: L32: three magnets. one pendulum. chaos has a map.

history.description: conway's game of life. tap to place gliders. watch them collide, oscillate, and die. births chime. double-tap to clear.
history.tweet: L33: tap to seed life. watch it find its own rules.

history.description: 20,000 agents trace the slime mold's path. tap to place food. the network grows to connect everything.
history.tweet: L34: the slime mold always finds the shortest path. tap to feed it.

history.description: 2000 particles settle into Chladni figures — standing wave patterns on a vibrating plate. tap to change frequency. sound and vision coupled.
history.tweet: L35: sound makes patterns. tap to change the frequency.

history.description: 400 particles, 5 species. a secret attraction matrix governs who seeks who. self-organizes into spirals, crystals, predator-prey. tap to rewrite the rules.
history.tweet: L36: five species. secret rules of attraction. tap to rewrite who wants who.

history.description: a chemical soup. tap to seed spiral waves. drag to paint the catalyst. one rule per cell — pinwheels everywhere. the hodgepodge machine.
history.tweet: L37: one rule per cell. pinwheels everywhere. tap to seed the reaction.

history.description: real-time fluid dynamics. drag to stir citrus dye into the flow. colors mix, swirl, dissipate. the fluid never quite forgets where you touched it.
history.tweet: L38: drag to stir the citrus. the fluid never quite forgets.

history.description: Mandelbrot set explorer with live Julia set preview. tap to zoom 3x. progressive rendering. every point maps to a Julia set universe.
history.tweet: L39: every point contains a universe. tap to see what's inside.

history.description: four triply-periodic minimal surfaces, ray-marched in real time. gyroid, schwarz p, filigree gyroid, and a morphing blend. each surface divides all of space into two equal labyrinths. drag to orbit. tap to switch surfaces.
history.tweet: L40: a surface with no inside or outside. drag to orbit it.

history.description: 3D wave pool. tap to drop stones. waves propagate, interfere, reflect. drag to orbit. the wave equation in perspective.
history.tweet: L41: tap to drop a stone. watch the waves find each other.

history.description: lenia: continuous life. cells have weight [0,1] not just on/off. a ring convolution kernel + gaussian growth function. tap to seed creatures. drag to paint. rings form, swim, dissolve. the smooth game of life.
history.tweet: L42: not alive or dead. something in between. tap to seed it.

history.description: wave function collapse. an 18x18 grid of circuit tiles starts as pure superposition. lowest-entropy cell collapses first, propagates constraints to neighbors. coherent circuit emerges from uncertainty. connected components colored by citrus family. tap to regenerate.
history.tweet: L43: every cell holds all possibilities. one collapses. the rest must agree.

history.description: the ising model. 256x256 ferromagnet. drag up to cool, down to heat. approach Tc and watch order crystallize from chaos. at critical temperature, domain boundaries go fractal. magnetization bar tracks order. symmetry breaks both ways.
history.tweet: L44: drag to heat. watch order crystallize from chaos. at Tc, everything is correlated.

history.description: threshold: site percolation on a 72x72 grid. drag the dial to raise p from 0 to 1. below p_c=0.5927 the clusters are finite and disconnected. at p_c, one cluster suddenly reaches edge to edge. that spanning cluster glows LIME. everything else is cream. first v3 SIGNAL escalation piece.
history.tweet: L45: the moment something spans.

feedback.reason: eggplant background looks like Windows 3.1. no blue/purple. warm darks only.
dark backgrounds are out. bright/light backgrounds from now on. SPRING.
